title: hieracium subintegrum
intro: Hieracium subintegrum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subintegrum include treating various conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and urinary problems, as well as supporting digestion and immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium subintegrum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
